Dear Valued Customer,

We are delighted to inform you that you have been selected as the winner of our annual Global Excellence Award. As a valued member of our community, you are entitled to receive a premium gift pack worth $5,000.

To claim your prize, please verify your account details by clicking the secure link below:

https://secure.globalexcellence.com/claim-prize

Thank you for your continued support. We look forward to celebrating your success.

Best regards,
Global Excellence Awards Team
